name: Golden Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the mushrooms in butter for 2-3 minutes.
2. Sprinkle with flour and mix well.
3. Add the bouillon and cook, stirring until thickened.
4. Stir in the lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Add a few almonds if desired.
Makes about 1 1/4 cups.
